title: Worked Examples
description: Pre-written worked examples for safe, step-by-step AI tutoring

topic_id.description: Reference to the topic these examples belong to

provenance.description: How this content was created: human, ai-assisted, ai-generated, or ai-observed

description.description: Brief overview of what these worked examples cover

worked_examples.description: List of worked examples with step-by-step solutions

id.description: Worked example ID in WE-nn format (e.g., WE-01, WE-02)

topic.description: Specific sub-topic or concept this example demonstrates

difficulty.description: Difficulty level of this worked example

tp_level.description: Tahap Penguasaan level (1-6) this example targets

kbat.description: True if this example involves Higher Order Thinking Skills (KBAT)

learning_objective.description: Learning objective ID this example helps achieve (e.g., LO01, 1.1.1)

real_world_analogy.description: A relatable real-world analogy to help students connect the concept to everyday life

misconception_alert.description: Common misconception this example specifically addresses or warns about

scenario.description: The problem scenario or question text presented to the student

working.description: Complete step-by-step working and solution, supports LaTeX via $...$
